gitCommit.subject: Merge production into val for production release
gitCommit.body:
Merge production into val for production release

Resolves conflict in lib/lambda/processEmails.ts by keeping val's
type-guard refactor and dropping temporary debug console.log statements
left on production from commit 25458929.

Preserves production-only hotfixes via auto-merge:
- lib/stacks/data.ts: 2-minute timeout on MapRoleLambdaFunction (e262f7f2)
- lib/local-constructs/create-topics/index.ts: grantInvoke for CloudFormation (4af31d0b)
